title: v0.26 WS-event protocol regression â€” remote gen completes but app hangs (progressâ†’progress_state, executing-nullâ†’execution_success)
description: ComfyUI v0.26.0 renamed/reshaped its WebSocket execution events; the app + Pod wrapper still listen for the v0.25.1 names, so a remote (and likely local) generation COMPLETES on the engine but the app never settles â€” status stuck 'LOADING MODEL', gallery card spins forever, gen clock counts endlessly. Floor-blocker for the v0.26 bump (MPI-139). PROVEN from live data: (1) `progress` â†’ `progress_state` (new batched shape {prompt_id, nodes:{id:{value,max,state:'running'|'finished'}}}) â€” app's progress + sampling-start handlers (commandExecutor.js:1106) dead â†’ status never advances. (2) `executing` with node===null sentinel REMOVED; completion now a dedicated `execution_success` message (v0.26 execution.py:815, broadcast=False, client-targeted) â€” TWO app handlers depend on the old sentinel: the Promise-resolve (comfyController.js:975, partially patched) AND exec.onComplete (commandExecutor.js:1139, drives the gallery placeholderâ†’asset swap). (3) wrapper.py watchdog.gen_end() (line 1470) + ModelInitSynth (line 386) also key off old executing/progress names â†’ wrapper-side gen-end + model-init-complete broken. (4) the model-init SSE channel (/comfy/events/stream) reconnect-loops every ~2min during long gens (cosmetic-ish, separate). UNINVESTIGATED: node renames (#14547) + category changes (#14460) vs the baked LTX-2.3 workflow class_type refs; other v0.26 API/route shape changes. NOTE: model_type FLUX log line for LTX = NORMAL (DiT arch class, not a bug). CPU-offloaded Gemma text-encoder + lowvram transformer thrash = slow load = MPI-146 (separate perf card), aggravates but does not cause the hang.
activeSessionTitle: v0.26 WS-event protocol regression â€” fix verified local, remote pending Pod build
